table.name: total_current_penjualan
table.viewSql: SELECT sales_order.id_customer, sum((sales_order_hpp.qty * sales_order_detail.harga)) AS total, sum( CASE WHEN sales_order_hpp.is_bonus THEN (sales_order_detail.harga_asli * sales_order_hpp.qty) WHEN (sales_order_hpp.is_diskon AND (NOT sales_order.is_ppn)) THEN (sales_order_detail.diskon_rp_1 * sales_order_hpp.qty) WHEN sales_order_hpp.is_diskon THEN (((sales_order_detail.harga * sales_order_detail.diskon_persen_1) / (100)::numeric) * sales_order_hpp.qty) ELSE (0)::numeric END) AS total_diskon FROM ((sales_order JOIN sales_order_detail ON ((sales_order_detail.id = sales_order.id))) JOIN sales_order_hpp ON (((sales_order_hpp.id = sales_order_detail.id) AND (sales_order_hpp.id_barang = sales_order_detail.id_barang)))) WHERE ((sales_order.status = ANY (ARRAY['D'::bpchar, 'W'::bpchar, 'C'::bpchar])) AND ((EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM (surat_jalan_detail JOIN surat_jalan ON ((surat_jalan.id = surat_jalan_detail.id))) WHERE ((surat_jalan_detail.id_sales_order_hpp = sales_order_hpp.id) AND (surat_jalan_detail.urut_sales_order_hpp = sales_order_hpp.urut) AND (surat_jalan.status = ANY (ARRAY['A'::bpchar, 'P'::bpchar, 'G'::bpchar]))))) OR (NOT (EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM surat_jalan WHERE (surat_jalan.id_sales_order = sales_order.id)))))) GROUP BY sales_order.id_customer;
